allow: Bash(convert ols.eps ols.png 2>&1 && convert davidson.eps davidson.png 2>&1 && convert davidson2.eps davidson2.png 2>&1 && echo "Converted OK" && ls -la *.png)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; Rscript -e 'needed <- c\("car","stats4","dplyr","mvtnorm","MASS","AER","ivreg","gmm","strucchange","ggfortify","survival","rmarkdown"\); installed <- rownames\(installed.packages\(\)\); missing <- setdiff\(needed, installed\); if\(length\(missing\)>0\) cat\("Missing:", paste\(missing, collapse=", "\), "\\n"\) else cat\("All packages installed\\n"\)')

Bash(cp -r _book /tmp/_book_deploy && git checkout gh-pages && rm -rf *.html *.png *.json site_libs survival_files _book _freeze .quarto .nojekyll 2>/dev/null && cp -r /tmp/_book_deploy/* . && touch .nojekyll && ls)
Bash(cp -r _book /tmp/_book_deploy && git stash -u && git checkout gh-pages)
